title: Dermasea nivalis
intro: Dermasea nivalis, also known as snow rose or snow rose grass, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Apiaceae. The health benefits of Dermasea nivalis include its potential to act as an anti-inflammatory and antioxidant, which may help to reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as cardiovascular disease and cancer. The bioactive constituents of Dermasea nivalis include sesquiterpene lactones, coumarins, and polyacetylenes, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Dermasea nivalis is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
taxonomy: Dermasea nivalis is classified as a genus within the family Rhamnaceae. This plant belongs to the order Rosales.
